title: Get UUID
description: A simple UUID conversion library for minecraft
body:
**DISCLAIMER** I do not claim to own or have created this datapack. I am simply distributing it from its original source: [guthub](https://github.com/gibbsly/gu/tree/main). This does not violate any copywrite as the project is licensed under [The Unlicese](https://unlicense.org).
This lisence allows for:
- Commercial Distibution
- Free Distribution
- Modification
- Private Use

The software is dedicated to the public domain and is free for anyone to do this. I have uplaoded this to moderinth for the purpose of allowing it to be used as a dependancy in projects and be able to be downloaded by [DPM (The Datapack Package Manager)](https://github.com/GearsDatapacks/dpm?tab=readme-ov-file) which a tutorial of can be found [here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k-XTY4bnaLs).

# Get UUID (gu) - What Is It?
gu is a simple UUID (Unique Universal Identifier) converison library pack that allows for getting the [hexidecimal](https://byjus.com/maths/hexadecimal-number-system/#:~:text=The%20hexadecimal%20number%20system%20is,digit%20represents%20a%20decimal%20value.) version of the UUID, typically found in most programs and can be generated for general use [here](https://www.uuidgenerator.net). This is the same style of UUID as you will see when looking at an entity and typing a command that takes an entity (e.g. ```kill bdee7f12-4539-444f-8ed0-8b67ae8ffefd```). This is required as even though ```/data get entity bdee7f12-4539-444f-8ed0-8b67ae8ffefd UUID``` is a thing, it returns like this: ```[1362246528346, 32149263498236, 2342349958666, 2346982349797]``` which is not usable in macro commands that affect entities.

# Get UUID (gu) - How to use it?
1. Install the datapack in the conventional way or through [dpm](https://github.com/GearsDatapacks/dpm?tab=readme-ov-file).
2. Reload/reboot the world
3. execute as the entity you wish to convert the UUID of into [hexidecimal](https://byjus.com/maths/hexadecimal-number-system/#:~:text=The%20hexadecimal%20number%20system%20is,digit%20represents%20a%20decimal%20value.) notation ```function gu:generate```
4. If you have a [hexideimal](https://byjus.com/maths/hexadecimal-number-system/#:~:text=The%20hexadecimal%20number%20system%20is,digit%20represents%20a%20decimal%20value.) UUID and you wish to convert it for a summon command or somthing where the entity is not visible run ```function gu:convert {UUID:"bdee7f12-4539-444f-8ed0-8b67ae8ffefd"``` or use a storage where the uuid is stored in a tag called: ```UUID```
5. After performing either step 3 or 4 the converted UUID will be in ```gu:main out```
